# Sources — Bridge Integration

> Verbatim source text appended chronologically.

## 2025-11-03 — meeting: Bridge Discovery

> Emily Parker framed the Bridge scope as three independent phases — phase 1 = auth, phase 2 = payouts, phase 3 = settlement reporting. Either team can proceed on any phase without blocking on the others. This was a better framing than anything we'd come up with internally.

Referenced by: [[bridge-integration]] — Timeline (scope decision), [[emily-parker]] — Observations (strength)

## 2026-03-28 — meeting: Bridge Integration Kickoff

> Emily came with the Payments merchant API schema already drafted. Sarah and Rachel reviewed it in the meeting — very little iteration needed. Three-phase scope confirmed. Rachel named as Bridge tech lead from the Platform side.

Referenced by: [[bridge-integration]] — Timeline, [[emily-parker]] — Recognition

## 2026-04-07 — email: Emily Parker, "Bridge phase 1 timeline"

> Hi Sam, following up on the kickoff — we need to pin the phase 1 timeline to Q2 planning. Can you confirm by April 14 whether Platform will be ready to start phase 1 integration by May 15? I know this depends on Atlas wave 1, so I wanted to get ahead of it.
>
> Also — we might need to change the merchant API contract to support a new fraud-check hook we're evaluating. Nothing urgent but I want Rachel to know in case it affects her state machine design.
>
> Thanks,
> Emily

Referenced by: [[bridge-integration]] — Open Tasks (phase 1 timeline confirmation), [[review-work]] — pending item (contract change ambiguity)
